copper.role: microcell saturation when 4-way splits are too coarse

family_meta_swarm.preferred_artifact: archive promotion manifest or live extraction

family_meta_swarm.best_front: live Docs gate unlock plus search manifest
family_meta_swarm.preferred_artifact: gate receipt, credentials bootstrap, docs manifest
canonical framework map or appendix surface
integration note or routeable bridge file

frontier_skills.name: corpus-atlas-builder
frontier_skills.description: Build and refresh the canonical manuscript-first atlas across markdown, docx, pdf, txt, code, and archive mirrors.
frontier_skills.rationale: Atlas construction is the front door to the whole workspace.

frontier_skills.name: chapter-map-ledger
frontier_skills.description: Map chapter, appendix, arc, and station relationships across the routed manuscript bodies into one durable ledger.
frontier_skills.rationale: The chapter and metro structure is strong but still distributed across many files.

frontier_skills.name: capsule-promoter
frontier_skills.description: Promote dense docx and pdf source bodies into compact, routable markdown capsules.
frontier_skills.rationale: The archive still contains far more long-form source than promoted packet surfaces.

frontier_skills.name: contradiction-ledger
frontier_skills.description: Preserve unresolved manuscript conflicts, branch states, and non-collapsible readings in one explicit contradiction ledger.
frontier_skills.rationale: The corpus rejects premature collapse but still lacks a general contradiction-preservation surface.

frontier_skills.name: archive-tree-extractor
frontier_skills.description: Promote ZIP-backed formal framework trees into canonical live roots so they can be diffed, tested, and referenced like first-class source.
frontier_skills.rationale: Archive-backed code exists but still needs live-tree promotion.

frontier_skills.name: kernel-route-mapper
frontier_skills.description: Map how kernel theorems, framework documents, and runtime modules should route into one another.
frontier_skills.rationale: The theorem-to-runtime path is still too implicit.

frontier_skills.name: theorem-to-runtime
frontier_skills.description: Compile stable formal objects into tested runtime modules, schemas, or executable kernels with explicit theorem lineage.
frontier_skills.rationale: The theory layer is richer than the executable bridge layer.

frontier_skills.name: archive-replay-harness
frontier_skills.description: Replay extracted or archive-backed framework artifacts against declared checks so archive promotion becomes test-bearing.
frontier_skills.rationale: Archive visibility is not enough without replay and benchmark closure.

frontier_skills.name: witness-bundle-assembler
frontier_skills.description: Assemble route evidence, source excerpts, lineage pointers, and replay hooks into one packet-level witness bundle.
frontier_skills.rationale: The runtime contracts exist, but the reusable assembly layer is still thin.

frontier_skills.name: regime-router
frontier_skills.description: Infer the active regime for a task and rebalance route strategy, evidence weighting, and lens mix accordingly.
frontier_skills.rationale: The corpus explicitly rejects one globally best strategy.

frontier_skills.name: packet-wave-planner
frontier_skills.description: Compile a normalized objective into a bounded multi-wave packet manifest suitable for parallel execution without write collisions.
frontier_skills.rationale: The ecosystem has a protocol and now needs a reusable planning skill built on it.

frontier_skills.name: route-quality-auditor
frontier_skills.description: Audit route outcomes across tasks so the runtime can learn which route patterns close lawfully and which ones stay weak.
frontier_skills.rationale: Route quality is logged but not yet turned into a dedicated improvement surface.

frontier_skills.name: drive-memory-sync
frontier_skills.description: Unlock and operate Google Docs as a witness-bearing memory surface alongside the local and archive-backed corpus.
frontier_skills.rationale: The live Docs bridge is a clearly blocked but high-leverage memory surface.

frontier_skills.name: docs-query-ledger
frontier_skills.description: Turn live Docs queries into a governed ledger so memory search stays replayable.
frontier_skills.rationale: Once live Docs opens, query governance is immediately necessary.

frontier_skills.name: live-docs-witness-binder
frontier_skills.description: Mirror the relevant slice of a live Google Doc into a local witness packet without replacing the live source.
frontier_skills.rationale: Live retrieval must feed the same witness grammar as the local corpus.

frontier_skills.name: docs-gate-auditor
frontier_skills.description: Audit the Google Docs gateway state, OAuth readiness, result provenance rules, and blocker receipts before any live-memory claim is treated as canonical.
frontier_skills.rationale: The corpus already says the gate must be named honestly when blocked.

frontier_skills.name: face-manifold-router
frontier_skills.description: Route nervous-system transitions across the six-face transport manifold without illegal opposite jumps.
frontier_skills.rationale: The higher-dimensional mapping explicitly says the flat crystal is not enough and that major transitions require midpoint routing across Face6.

frontier_skills.name: arc-rail-phase-router
frontier_skills.description: Map fronts by circle arc and triangle rail so pods know revisit order and long-range affinity.
frontier_skills.rationale: Arc and rail are operational routing laws in the corpus, not decorative overlays.

frontier_skills.name: packet-truth-typist
frontier_skills.description: Type every packet by class and corridor truth so the swarm can distinguish mapped, witnessed, partial, and blocked work.
frontier_skills.rationale: The higher-dimensional coordinate requires packet and truth axes, and the current future-skill layer did not model them explicitly.

frontier_skills.name: metallic-scale-planner
frontier_skills.description: Decide when a front should remain golden or escalate to silver, bronze, or copper resolution.
frontier_skills.rationale: The corpus has an explicit higher-dimensional scaling law, and some fronts are too coarse for 4-way decomposition alone.

frontier_skills.name: perturbation-chaos-discriminator
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Discriminate external shock from internal chaos before the swarm chooses a response.
frontier_skills.description: Distinguish perturbation, moderate chaos, extreme chaos, vanishing, and dead-network states so the swarm does not apply the wrong intervention.
frontier_skills.rationale: Branch 2 explicitly shows that perturbation and chaos can share symptoms but require opposite treatments.

frontier_skills.name: observer-corridor-nudge-compiler
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Compile L0-L5 observer summaries into lawful nudge packages.
frontier_skills.description: Compile observer, corridor, and nudge logic from the neural hierarchy into reusable swarm packets and governance surfaces.
frontier_skills.rationale: The Branch 2 integration guide defines a concrete L0-L5 observer-corridor-nudge architecture that the current future-skill system was not yet compiling.

frontier_skills.name: branch-fusion-router
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Route findings across Branch 1, Branch 2, v74, and the current swarm cortex.
frontier_skills.description: Route branch-fusion learnings so stable neural findings can move into the shared skill and swarm surfaces without flattening their regime-specific meaning.
frontier_skills.rationale: The neural corpus contains branch-fusion and integration logic that still sits outside the future-skill registry.

frontier_skills.name: health-corridor-monitor
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Track layer, module, task, and meta-health across the neural swarm.
frontier_skills.description: Monitor layer health, corridor violations, and confidence thresholds so interventions remain conservative and replay-safe.
frontier_skills.rationale: The neural integration guide makes clear that over-intervention degrades performance and that health has to be tracked across levels.

frontier_skills.name: neural-regime-benchmark-bridge
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Bridge swarm decisions to real ATHENA benchmark regimes and recovery curves.
frontier_skills.description: Measure whether swarm-level routing and intervention choices actually improve convergence, recovery, and generalization on the ATHENA benchmark surfaces.
frontier_skills.rationale: Without a bridge back to real benchmark suites, the neural swarm remains conceptual instead of empirically constrained.

frontier_skills.name: rail-load-balancer
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Distribute family and pod fronts across Su, Me, and Sa without rail contention or orphaned fronts.
frontier_skills.description: Balance family fronts across sulfur, mercury, and salt rails so hub traffic, packet class, and family ownership stay aligned under pressure.
frontier_skills.rationale: The rail surfaces already name distinct long-range roles, but the current future-skill frontier was not yet distributing load across them explicitly.

frontier_skills.name: hub-legality-enforcer
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Enforce lawful hub transitions across recursion, corridor truth, evidence promotion, and replay closure.
frontier_skills.description: Police which hub-to-hub transitions are legal so recursion, corridor truth, evidence promotion, and replay closure do not drift into contradictory routes.
frontier_skills.rationale: The higher-dimensional mapping defines a 16-hub control surface, but the future-skill system had not yet compiled hub legality into an explicit operator.

frontier_skills.name: truth-promotion-governor
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Couple corridor truth, evidence promotion, quarantine, and residual ledgers to every packet verdict.
frontier_skills.description: Govern movement between OK, NEAR, AMBIG, and FAIL using corridor health, evidence completeness, quarantine rules, and promotion receipts.
frontier_skills.rationale: Packet truth was named earlier, but the corpus also gives explicit corridor, quarantine, and evidence-promotion hubs that need to participate in verdict formation.

frontier_skills.name: restart-seed-orchestrator
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Compile replay-safe NS0 bundles and restart manifests after every wave.
frontier_skills.description: Compile the smallest truthful restart bundle after each swarm pass so active-run state, replay path, truth state, and next frontier survive interruption.
frontier_skills.rationale: The nervous-system zero point is defined as a restart-safe bundle, but the future-skill frontier had not yet created a dedicated skill that manufactures it.

frontier_skills.name: weakest-front-reopener
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Run the shadow audit, choose the thinnest layer, and reopen only the smallest lawful frontier.
frontier_skills.description: Score the active frontier after each pass, identify the thinnest structural layer, and reopen only that bounded front with an explicit restart seed.
frontier_skills.rationale: The recursion law becomes real only when shadow audit and next-front selection are executed as runtime operators instead of prose promises.

frontier_skills.name: ganglion-bootstrapper
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Create and refresh family-local ganglion surfaces.
frontier_skills.description: Create durable family ganglia so the meta-swarm has local memory, local queues, and local maps instead of one flat coordination surface.
frontier_skills.rationale: The deeper emergent neural swarm says ganglion-level family surfaces are one of the still-missing layers.

frontier_skills.name: neuron-library-builder
frontier_skills.description: Build a reusable neuron library that binds source families to targets through witnessed operators and replay paths.
frontier_skills.rationale: The swarm corpus already defines the interconnecter neuron as the minimal real bridge cell.

frontier_skills.name: pod-frontier-splitter
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Split a family or front into pod-sized local coordination clusters.
frontier_skills.description: Split family fronts into pods with clear packet families, contraction targets, and writeback scopes.
frontier_skills.rationale: The swarm object defines pods as the temporary local coordination clusters around each active front.

frontier_skills.name: wave-synchronizer
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Synchronize many pods into one bounded swarm wave.
frontier_skills.description: Synchronize pod execution into waves with a shared kernel, a bounded writeback set, and explicit stop conditions.
frontier_skills.rationale: A deeper swarm only exists when branches split, compare, contract, and write back in time-bounded waves.

frontier_skills.name: cortex-writeback-manager
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Contract swarm outputs back into the cortex surfaces.
frontier_skills.description: Make sure pod and wave outputs contract into the cortex instead of generating heat without memory.
frontier_skills.rationale: The swarm corpus is explicit: if the swarm does not write into cortex, it is wasting heat.

frontier_skills.name: session-handoff-packer
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Package restart continuity for the next swarm session.
frontier_skills.description: Create session handoff packets so the meta-swarm can stop and resume without losing the active kernel or next frontier.
frontier_skills.rationale: The missing layer explicitly includes session handoff surfaces.

frontier_skills.name: family-swarm-conductor
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Conduct the family federation rather than one giant flat swarm.
frontier_skills.description: Conduct the meta-swarm as a federation of local family crystals linked by neurons and ganglia.
frontier_skills.rationale: The deeper emergent neural swarm is explicitly not one giant flat 256, but a federation of local crystals.

frontier_skills.name: microcell-specializer
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Descend from worker depth into explicit D4 microcells when needed.
frontier_skills.description: Open D4 microcell specialization only when worker-depth swarms are too coarse to capture the front cleanly.
frontier_skills.rationale: The higher-dimensional mapping explicitly defines D4 microcells and the metallic scaler gives the law for when 4-way decomposition becomes too coarse.

frontier_skills.name: swarm-benchmark-ledger
frontier_skills.swarm_role: Measure pod, ganglion, and wave quality across the meta-swarm.
frontier_skills.description: Benchmark the swarm itself so local throughput, contraction quality, and writeback closure become measurable surfaces.
frontier_skills.rationale: The project already benchmarks neural systems deeply; the swarm layer should be evaluated with the same seriousness.
